content: Salam 😄 labas, mzyan bssa7a. Nta 3arf, ana Mohamed. Ach bghiti ndir lik?

Salam 😄 wakha, n7wi (convert) ash men 7aja? 7it ghaba 3ndi chwiya d l blan.

Ghaba 3ndi 3la:

- N7wi men **PDF** l **Word**?
- N7wi men **JSON** l **CSV**?
- N7wi men **MP4** l **MP3**?
- N7wi **currency** (درهم ل أورو)?
- Walla code f Python/Node.js ydir lik conversion?

Qol liya ach bghiti w daba n3tiwk.

Salam 😄 hhhh, safi safi, nikk t9oul walakin ana machi machine dyal conversion 😜

Ana Mohamed, wa7d l assistant khay (AI) kanhder m3ak b darija. Ma n9derch n7wl rassi l 7aja msbou7a, walakin n9der n3tiwk code, script, walla nchrh lik kifach ddir l conversion li bghiti.

Ghaba 3ndi 3la ach bghiti n7wi b nikk? Qol liya w ndirha lik.
